title: Deadfast Power Kill Rat Trap
features: Power kill rat trap features a high impact kill bar ensuring a quick humane kill
Power kill trap come with a bait trough for easy baiting
Traps feature nail holes for more placement options
Trap can be used indoors or outdoors and is reusable
Trap is set by a simple pull back till you hear a click mechanism
description: From the manufacturer Deadfast Power Kill Rat Trap Fast. Powerful.. Done Quickly trap and kill rats easily with the most powerful solution. This trap features an effective design with a large bait cup and highly sensitive trip pedal. Once contact is made with the pedal, the trap’s High-Impact Kill Bar instantly snaps shut, ensuring a quick kill. Ideal for anywhere rats are not welcome, whether it’s your home, attic, garage, or the workplace, with Deadfast Power-Kill rat trap, your problem is solved. Key Benefits: High-impact snap bar ensures a quick kill Set and release in just 1 click. Large bait cup for easy baiting. For indoors & outdoors use; ideal for runway trapping. Oversized pedal to maximise catch. No chemicals Reusable Top Tips: Maximise Success The Deadfast Power-Kill rat trap’s oversized trip pedal makes it difficult to avoid, helping to maximise mice catches. Whenever a rat steps onto the trip pedal, whether attempting to eat the bait or simply investigating, the snap bar will activate. Once triggered, the High-Impact Kill Bar shuts for a quick, immediate kill. Easy to Use and One Click Setting The large bait cup at the centre of the trip pedal, offers plenty of room for adding attractive mouse snacks. The one-click, one step open-and-close design also makes it easy to set, use, and dispose of the dead mouse. without having to touch it. The trap features durable plastic construction, and it can be reused again and again or disposed of. Placement Use anywhere around the home or outdoors. Once the trap is set, place anywhere you’ve noticed activity. Each powerful rat trap features two holes on the back for attachment to pipes, beams, and other hard-to-access places where rats thrive. Since rats commonly travel along the edge of a room, where the floor meets the wall, placing the trap with the bait side along the wall helps promote effective results. How To Use: Before using, remove the securing clip from the kill bar. 2- BAIT: Apply bait (for example peanut butter/chocolate spread) in the trough provided. 3- SET: Pull back the kill bar to a 90° angle until it clicks and locks into place. 4- PLACE: Position trap against the wall at a right angle where rats are known to travel (or where you have seen activity of rats). 5- DISPOSAL: Hold the trap over a double bag. Slowly lift the rear kill bar to release the rat. Dispose of the bag into a bin with a secure lid. Always read the full label and product information before use .
